km.Enstone, Oxfordshire, England: អេនsតូន, អូចប៉ូរdស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry於大約1570年出生在英國奧可福爾恩斯同。他於大約1594年與Jane在英國英格蘭奧可福爾恩斯同結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1624年8月30日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry于大约1570年出生在英国奧可福爾恩斯同。他于大约1594年与Jane在英国英格兰奧可福爾恩斯同结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1624年8月30日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fawdry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a topographical name from an Anglo-Norman French * fourderaie ‘blackthorn thicket’, a suffixed form of fourder ‘blackthorn’, which also appears as fouder.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry was born about 1570, in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England. He married Jane about 1594, in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 30 August 1624, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry est né environ 1570, à Enstone, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Jane environ 1594, à Enstone, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 30 août 1624, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry wurde um 1570 in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1594 in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Jane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 30. August 1624 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry è nato il circa 1570 nel Enstone, Oxfordshire, England. Lui sposato Jane circa 1594, nel Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 30 agosto 1624, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Enstone, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdryは約1570年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーンで生まれた。約1594年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーンでJaneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1624年8月30日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry(은)는 대략 1570년 영국 스퍼드실르 스톤에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1594년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스톤에서 Jane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1624년 8월 30일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Jane aproximadamente 1594, em Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1624, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry родился около 1570 г. в местности энстоун, оксфордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane около 1594 г. в местности энстоун, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 30 августа 1624 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Fawdry nació aproximadamente 1570, en Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Jane aproximadamente 1594, en Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1624, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
